sellingText: Selling Dolphins cos they have the 9th best schedule when you need them to a someone who can use them in the finals because they have the 2nd best schedule
Selling Sharks cos they have the hardest schedule when you need them to a someone who can use them in the finals because they have the 3rd best schedule
Selling Bunnies cos they have the 10th best schedule when you need them to a someone who can use them in the finals because they have the 4th best schedule
buyingText: Buying Manly players because they have the 3rd best schedule when you need them but the deal sweetener is targeting someone at the top of the ladder and telling them Manly have the worst schedule in the finals

Buying Warriors players because they have the 2nd best schedule when you need them but the deal sweetener is targeting someone at the top of the ladder and telling them Warriors have the 5th hardest schedule in the finals
examples: Kayal Iro for Tolutau Koula / Reuben Garrick
